paragraphs: I am writing to apply for the Operations Director role at Kite Analytics. Your mission — giving mid-size manufacturers real-time visibility into their own plants — is the exact problem I have spent the last decade solving from the plant floor up.

At Aurora Logistics I lead operations across 24 sites, the same scale Kite is targeting for its next wave of customers; I know first-hand what a plant manager needs to see before trusting a new dashboard enough to act on it.

In eighteen months I cut average downtime 38% by pairing real-time data with a disciplined S&OP process — proof that software like Kite's only pays off when operations and technology are designed together.
I would welcome the chance to discuss how that experience could help Kite's pilot customers convert faster into long-term accounts. Thank you for your consideration.
